name: Chicken Wild Rice Dish
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup saute Butter, Mrs. Bateman's Butterlike (tm)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a kettle, sauté the first five ingredients in the butter substitute until tender.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
3. Spoon the mixture into a greased 13 x 9-inch baking dish.
4. Cover and bake at 350°F for 75 minutes.
5. Uncover and bake for an additional 15 minutes, or until heated through.
6. This dish may be assembled and refrigerated overnight. Remove from the refrigerator 1 hour before baking.
